---
title: "Customization"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Customization}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment   = "#>",
  warning   = FALSE,
  message   = FALSE,
  eval      = interactive()
)
```

This vignette answers the question *how do I tailor ggpaintr's defaults?* Companion vignettes cover the use-case ladder (`vignette("ggpaintr-use-cases")`), the safety story (`vignette("ggpaintr-safety")`), real ggplot recipes (`vignette("ggpaintr-gallery")`), and LLM integration (`vignette("ggpaintr-llm")`).

## Rewriting copy with `ui_text`

<!-- TODO:
- six-section override catalog
- merge precedence rules
- helpers: ptr_ui_text, ptr_resolve_ui_text
-->

## Adding a new widget type

<!-- TODO: introduce the three constructors (ptr_define_placeholder_value / _consumer / _source) one at a time, each with a worked example. Source material: gallery §3 "Three reusable custom placeholders" (range / colvars / date). -->

## Unregistering

<!-- TODO: ptr_clear_placeholder for cleanup between sessions / examples. -->
